titleStmt.title: SII 28.72: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 72. (A.R. No. 70 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, north wall of the maṇḍapa in front

Fragmentary. Contains portions of the king's meykkīrti, puyal vāyttu etc. Even in this truncated portion of the meykkīrrti, there is an interesting variant version of the king's dealings with the Pāṇḍyas. It is stated that his expedition against the progeny of Vīra-pāṇḍya was undertaken at the request of Vikrama-pāṇḍya.

Records a royal order stating that the kāṇi of Irājēndira-chōḻa-achāriyan will continue to be his kāṇi as before and that this order was issued at the instance of Irāja-rāja-ma[ṅ]galādarāyaṉ. This order was directed to be inscribed on stone. This was attested by various officials.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
palaventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉunitit taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkollum tikkaṉaittum celanaṭappak kaṟpakālam puvikāppa poṟpamainta muṭi puṉainta vikkirama pāṇṭiyan veṇṭaviṭṭa taṇṭāl virapāṇṭiyan makkaḷ paṭa Eḻḻakam paṭa maṟappaṭai paṭa ciṅkaḷappaṭai mukkaṟuppuṇṭu Alaikaṭalil puka maṇaThe beginning and the end of the inscription as well as the continuation of the four lines are lost.
raṭiyum Eṭuttu cempon virasiṁhāsanattup puvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari panmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ maturai koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḷadevarkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ konerinmaikoṇṭān keyamāṇikkavaḷaṉāṭṭut tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭi kaṇapatiśvaramuṭaiyār
yavantāṉāṉa Irājendracoḻa Ācāriyaṉukku muṉpu kāṇiyāya varumenṟum Ikkāṇi paḻaiyapaṭiye peṟavum Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilile kalveṭṭavum peṟaveṇumenṟu Irācarāca ma kalātarāyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyakkaṭavatākac collik kaṇakkillum Iṭṭuk koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkuc conṉom Ikko
Olai Irācentiraciṅka muventaveḷān Eḻuttu ciṅkaḷarāyan Eḻattum viḻiñattaraiyaṉeḻuttum kaṉakarāyaṉeḻuttum vayirāyarāyaṉeḻuttum viḻuppātarāyaṉeḻuttum nuḷamparāyaṉeḻuttum Aṉakarāyaṉeḻuttum maḻavarāyaṉeḻuttum malaiyapparāya ṉeḻuttum vayirāyarāyaṉeḻuttum nantiyarāyaṉeḻuttum Iṭṭu 10vatu 10000 2 1000 3 100ṉāl prasādam ceytu
Digital edition of SII 28.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
